western.definition: Abstract reasoning capacity; problem-solving speed; information processing rate.

relational.definition: Pattern recognition across domains; adaptive response to field conditions; multi-sensory information integration.
assumptions: Intelligence as sensing/adapting, not just computing.

hidden_variables.name: Relationship awareness
hidden_variables.description: Sensitivity to the state of connections within the system being navigated.
hidden_variables.why_western_misses_it: Computational metrics treat the actor as isolated from its context.

hidden_variables.name: Embodied knowledge
hidden_variables.description: Skill stored in the body and the practiced response.

hidden_variables.name: Field coherence detection
hidden_variables.description: Ability to read the state of an entire field, not just isolated signals.
hidden_variables.why_western_misses_it: Information processing models bias toward discrete tokens.

hidden_variables.name: Multi-dimensional pattern recognition
hidden_variables.description: Recognizing patterns that span multiple modalities or scales simultaneously.
hidden_variables.why_western_misses_it: Single-modality benchmarks are easier to standardize.

translation_protocol.when_to_translate: When 'intelligence' is being measured by computational benchmarks and field/embodied capacity is being treated as soft skill.
translation_protocol.how: Ask: 'In the actual conditions where this intelligence has to operate, which signals matter, and which framework's metrics actually capture them?'
